name: Frosted Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and shortening by hand until creamy.
2. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix all dry ingredients together and add alternately with milk, beginning and ending with flour. Add vanilla and mix on low speed to combine.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured large tube pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 1 hour and 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely.
5. Prepare the frosting: Sift together powdered sugar, cocoa, and vanilla. Beat butter until creamy. Gradually add the sugar mixture, beating on low speed. Add hot milk and the remainder of the sugar, continuing to beat well. Scrape the sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula. Stir in additional vanilla.
6. Spread the frosting over the cooled cake.
This version maintains the original recipe's title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency.
